work_package_result.summary: Pinned the cross-language development toolchain, added Cargo, pnpm and uv locks, implemented a credential-free cross-platform bootstrap and exact-version doctor, and made the existing Rust, Python and TypeScript baselines pass from a clean checkout.

passed: just python (2 adapter tests and 6 tooling tests)
just ts (desktop, mobile and Node adapter host)
doctor exact-version probes for Rust 1.97.0, Node 22.23.1, pnpm 10.0.0, Python 3.13.5, uv 0.9.26, Buf 1.71.0, protoc 35.1 and just 1.56.0
not_run: GitHub-hosted clean runner; final CI composition and observed Actions evidence belong to WP-M00-003
native Tauri/mobile packaging is outside this package

findings_closed: Resolved Windows corepack.cmd discovery for Python subprocesses
Activated the MSVC Build Tools environment automatically for Windows Rust commands
Forced nested workspace scripts through Corepack so global Node and pnpm cannot leak into the pinned run
Made bootstrap subprocesses non-interactive so an existing incompatible node_modules tree cannot block unattended execution
Adjusted the diff budget to account for mandatory generated lockfiles without expanding semantic scope

observability_changes: just doctor prints expected and actual versions with an explicit status for every pinned tool
known_limitations: The clean-checkout test used an empty detached worktree on the prepared Windows host and could reuse global download caches; WP-M00-003 supplies clean GitHub runner evidence
mise requires its normal explicit trust step for a newly cloned repository
Protocol generation and Buf compatibility gates remain WP-M00-002
